title: What Our Customers Say
description:
Real reviews from our valued guests.
5.0 rating on Google!

items.title: Authentic Indian Food
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: A small but perfectly formed Indian Restaurant within walking distance to Wroclaw town centre, serving authentic Indian food and drinks. I truly enjoyed the meal, personal service, relaxed and friendly ambience. Highly recommended.

items.title: Amazing Experience!
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: I was in Wrocław for 3 days and I ate here for all 3 days! Definitely good portion comparing to the price and quality they provide. They use natural ingredients and don't use any artificial colours. I highly recommend this place!

items.title: Best Combination
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: Moong masala with garlic naan is the best combination I had. Delicious dry fruit lassi! I would like to visit again and again.

items.title: Best Indian Food
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: The best Indian food! Great coffee too! Dogs are also welcome here. Highly recommended!

items.title: Natural Ingredients
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: They use natural ingredients without artificial colors. After eating at most restaurants I feel sick, but here it was very good. Good food is very important for me during travel.

items.title: Perfect Service
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: Personal service, relaxed and friendly ambience. Would happily eat there on my own. The quality and authenticity of the food is outstanding!

items.title: Must Visit Place
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: Amazing experience, loved it. Must visit place. Definitely good portions and quality. Will definitely come back during my next trip.

items.title: Authentic & Fresh
items.name: Google Reviewer
items.text: Authentic Indian cuisine in Wrocław. Fresh ingredients, perfect spice levels, and generous portions. Coffee from Mała Czarna is excellent too!
